description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: `maxAmount` sets a hard cap on the level of allocation to an Instance at any given time. It sets the absolute rate limit regardless of how much time has passed since the last allocation. For example, if `maxAmount` is set to 1,000,000 tokens, the rate limit will increase over time at the rate determined by the `slope` until it reaches 1,000,000 tokens
this point the rate limit will stop increasing, but it will resume increasing once an allocation to the Instance has been made.
description: Corrects punctuation in the MaxAmount definition for clarity.
